response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack engineer with broad web, mobile, and some embedded-adjacent exposure, but the role's hard requirements are a poor match. There is no evidence of native-level Japanese, no demonstrated C-for-UNIX production work in the last decade, no Linux kernel modification experience, and no background in LAN-switch security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP) or chip-vendor SDKs. The profile points toward TypeScript/Node/DLang web and platform work rather than embedded firmware security.
strengths: Long, varied software career with senior/staff-level delivery experience
Strong testing/TDD discipline and developer-tooling mindset
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang, C/C++ at National Instruments, and Linux
concerns: No Linux kernel source modification or embedded firmware security experience
Missing core stack: MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF/SNMP, switch chip SDKs, C-for-UNIX recency

key_factors.factor: No embedded LAN-switch / kernel security experience
General senior engineering and systems breadth
